heading: Nonapplicability to certain persons
label: 187 Nonapplicability to certain persons
text: The prohibitions and penalties of this chapter shall not apply to any officer or agent of the United States acting within the scope of his authority, nor to any person acting upon his written instructions or permission.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 157 (, ).Feb. 1, 1952, ch. 4, § 766 Stat. 6Language is changed.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 157 (, ).Feb. 1, 1952, ch. 4, § 766 Stat. 6Language is changed.
